title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF ALBOR, PROVINCE OF SURIGAO DEL NORTE, TO LIBJO.

chunks.text:
H. NO. 1114 / 65 OG No. 8, 1806 (February 24, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4981, June 17, 1967 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF ALBOR, PROVINCE OF SURIGAO DEL NORTE, TO LIBJO.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Municipality of Albor in the Province of Surigao del Norte is hereby changed to Libjo.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 17, 1967.
